name: Crustless Potato Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Frozen hash-brown potatoes - from 26 oz pkg, thawed
6 slices Turkey bacon, crisp and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Crease a 9-inch pie pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except paprika and bacon. Mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into the greased pie pan and sprinkle with paprika.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes or until set.
6. Sprinkle with bacon and bake an additional 5 minutes.
7. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
